---
page-layout: full
---

<style>

.hero {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 80px 20px;
}

.hero h1 {
  font-size: 56px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.hero p {
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #6b7684;
}

.hero img {
  margin-top: 40px;
  width: 700px;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

</style>


<div class="hero">

# Data Analytics & Visualization

Welcome to my coursework website for **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Application**.  
This website showcases my work in **data exploration, visualisation, and analytical techniques**.

<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551288049-bebda4e38f71?q=80&w=1600&auto=format&fit=crop">

</div>
